Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# Read upload-documents.json
with open\('/Users/tschigo/Developer/dls/fedex-rest-sdk/docs/upload-documents.json', 'r'\) as f:
    upload = json.load\(f\)

print\("=" * 80\)
print\("UPLOAD-DOCUMENTS.JSON - SCHEMAS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

schemas = upload.get\('components', {}\).get\('schemas', {}\)
schema_list = sorted\(schemas.keys\(\)\)

print\(f"Total schemas: {len\(schema_list\)}\\n"\)

for schema_name in schema_list:
    schema_def = schemas[schema_name]
    schema_type = schema_def.get\('type', 'N/A'\)
    description = schema_def.get\('description', 'No description'\)
    # Truncate long descriptions
    if len\(description\) > 80:
        description = description[:77] + "..."
    print\(f"{schema_name:50} | Type: {schema_type:15} | {description}"\)

EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# Read ship.json and find enums
with open\('/Users/tschigo/Developer/dls/fedex-rest-sdk/docs/ship.json', 'r'\) as f:
    ship = json.load\(f\)

print\("=" * 80\)
print\("SHIP.JSON - ENUMS/CONSTANTS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

schemas = ship.get\('components', {}\).get\('schemas', {}\)
enums_found = []

for schema_name, schema_def in schemas.items\(\):
    # Check for enum in the schema itself
    if 'enum' in schema_def:
        enum_values = schema_def.get\('enum', []\)
        enum_type = schema_def.get\('type', 'string'\)
        enums_found.append\(\(schema_name, enum_type, enum_values\)\)
    
    # Check properties for enums
    if 'properties' in schema_def:
        for prop_name, prop_def in schema_def['properties'].items\(\):
            if 'enum' in prop_def:
                enum_values = prop_def.get\('enum', []\)
                enum_type = prop_def.get\('type', 'string'\)
                enums_found.append\(\(f"{schema_name}.{prop_name}", enum_type, enum_values\)\)

# Print the first 50 enums
print\(f"Found {len\(enums_found\)} enum fields\\n"\)
for i, \(name, enum_type, values\) in enumerate\(enums_found[:50]\):
    values_str = ", ".join\(str\(v\)[:15] for v in values[:5]\)
    if len\(values\) > 5:
        values_str += f", ... \({len\(values\)} total\)"
    print\(f"{i+1:3}. {name:60} | {values_str}"\)

EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# Read the collection
with open\('/Users/tschigo/Developer/dls/fedex-rest-sdk/docs/Ship APIResponse JSONApiCollection/Ship API_collection.json', 'r'\) as f:
    collection = json.load\(f\)

print\("=" * 80\)
print\("SHIP API COLLECTION - FOLDER/TEST CASE SUMMARY"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

def count_tests_and_folders\(items\):
    test_count = 0
    folder_count = 0
    for item in items:
        if 'request' in item and 'method' in item['request']:
            test_count += 1
        elif 'item' in item:
            folder_count += 1
            sub_tests, sub_folders = count_tests_and_folders\(item['item']\)
            test_count += sub_tests
            folder_count += sub_folders
    return test_count, folder_count

items = collection.get\('item', []\)
total_tests, total_folders = count_tests_and_folders\(items\)

print\(f"Total Folders: {total_folders}"\)
print\(f"Total Test Cases: {total_tests}"\)

# Get folder names
print\("\\nFolder Structure:"\)
for item in items:
    if 'item' in item:
        name = item.get\('name', 'Unknown'\)
        sub_items = item.get\('item', []\)
        test_count = sum\(1 for sub in sub_items if 'request' in sub\)
        print\(f"  - {name}: {test_count} test cases"\)

EOF)
